name: @claudegram/shared
//: Decision: @claudegram/shared is consumed exclusively by Bun-runtime workspaces (daemon, channel-server). Bun resolves the 'bun' condition and loads the .ts source directly. The 'default' fallback intentionally points at the same TS source — there is no Node consumer today, and we deliberately do not maintain a compiled dist/index.js to avoid a stale-build hazard. If a Node consumer is ever added, build a dist/index.js and switch 'default' to it.
